goal: Expose state graph run, trace, task, status, and event-type summaries as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human run report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph run reports include run IDs, traces, tasks, statuses, event types, and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert run lineage.
